key_results.best_ideal_strategy: D+SQR+CP (2 blocks, 9 gates, F=1.000) — CAVEAT: ideal-mode only; bounded-displacement follow-up reaches only F=0.5291 at N_cav=12
key_results.best_native_strategy: GRAPE 400ns (F=0.999, model-based N_cav=8) — only validated high-fidelity approach
key_results.iteration3_critical_finding: N_cav=2 ideal-mode results are truncation artifacts; parametric strategies have >74-93% leakage at N_cav=8
key_results.iteration4_conclusion: Bounded displacement suppresses leakage only by sacrificing too much control expressivity; no high-fidelity native decomposition was recovered at N_cav=12
